headline: What Makes Charles Schwab (SCHW) a New Strong Buy Stock
summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Charles Schwab, Raises Price Target to $133
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $125 to $133.
